reason_for_decision: Well-scoped, deployment-aware, and strong at translating solar-site geometry into monitoring architecture choices.
strengths: Frames solar security correctly as a deployment-architecture problem rather than a simple camera-selection topic.
Adds strong decision value by separating perimeter awareness, asset-zone verification, and communications design.
Connects site geometry, power resilience, maintenance reality, and backhaul constraints in a practical way.
summary_assessment: A solid professional knowledge-base article with good deployment depth, clear solar-site specificity, and practical guidance for geometry, power, and communications planning.
